assertionResults.fullName: MaterialEngine -- A. Golden Path A-1: calculateMaterialCost returns correct total for each segment
assertionResults.title: A-1: calculateMaterialCost returns correct total for each segment

assertionResults.fullName: MaterialEngine -- A. Golden Path A-2: getMaterialRequirements returns valid data for every segment
assertionResults.title: A-2: getMaterialRequirements returns valid data for every segment

assertionResults.fullName: MaterialEngine -- A. Golden Path A-3: full inventory makes checkMaterialAvailability return available=true
assertionResults.title: A-3: full inventory makes checkMaterialAvailability return available=true

assertionResults.fullName: MaterialEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B-1: calculateMaterialCost with zero quantity returns 0
assertionResults.title: B-1: calculateMaterialCost with zero quantity returns 0

assertionResults.fullName: MaterialEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B-2: calculateMaterialCost with very large quantity (10M) is finite
assertionResults.title: B-2: calculateMaterialCost with very large quantity (10M) is finite

assertionResults.fullName: MaterialEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B-3: checkMaterialAvailability with empty inventory marks everything missing
assertionResults.title: B-3: checkMaterialAvailability with empty inventory marks everything missing

assertionResults.fullName: MaterialEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B-4: consumeMaterials from empty inventory yields all-zero quantities
assertionResults.title: B-4: consumeMaterials from empty inventory yields all-zero quantities

assertionResults.fullName: MaterialEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B-5: consumeMaterials clamps to zero when quantity exceeds stock
assertionResults.title: B-5: consumeMaterials clamps to zero when quantity exceeds stock

assertionResults.fullName: MaterialEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B-6: calculateMaterialQualityImpact with no matching inventory uses defaults
assertionResults.title: B-6: calculateMaterialQualityImpact with no matching inventory uses defaults

assertionResults.fullName: MaterialEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B-7: calculateHoldingCosts on empty inventory returns 0
assertionResults.title: B-7: calculateHoldingCosts on empty inventory returns 0

assertionResults.fullName: MaterialEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B-8: calculateHoldingCosts is exactly 2% of total inventory value
assertionResults.title: B-8: calculateHoldingCosts is exactly 2% of total inventory value

assertionResults.fullName: MaterialEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B-9: each segment has a unique set of material specs
assertionResults.title: B-9: each segment has a unique set of material specs

assertionResults.fullName: MaterialEngine -- B. Edge Scenarios B-10: calculateMaterialCost scales linearly with quantity
assertionResults.title: B-10: calculateMaterialCost scales linearly with quantity
